title: esql.get_dataset

name.description: A comma-separated list of dataset names or wildcard patterns. Omit to return all datasets.

master_timeout.description: Period to wait for a connection to the master node.

description:
Get ES|QL datasets.

Returns one or more datasets used in ES|QL data federation.
A concrete-name miss returns `404`; a wildcard pattern or list-all request with no match
returns `200` with an empty array.
